title: Logical Zoom
description: A simple zoom key for Minecraft
body:
This is a simple Minecraft Fabic mod that adds a configurable zoom key.
 
It stacks it's zoom with the spyglass too for maximum zooooooom!
 
If you're a content creator, it would be super nice of you if you could mention the mod and point people to my channel here: https://youtube.com/logicalgeekboy

By default the C key is mapped for zooming (as with Optifine) but you can change this in the Controls settings of Minecraft. If you already have the C key bound then you'll need to remap it before it'll work :o)
 
NOTE: This mod requires Fabric API mod
